---
title: "The Heimskringla, or, Chronicle of the Kings of Norway, translated from the Icelandic of Snorro Sturleson"
---

## The Heimskringla, or, Chronicle of the Kings of Norway, translated from the Icelandic of Snorro Sturleson

**Author:** Samuel Laing
**Date:** 1844
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
